falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index rises by more than 5% from its current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish move would contradict the HOLD signal and suggest the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 50 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff score would indicate heightened market stress, invalidating the current analysis based on the historical bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: The pattern match percentage drops below 70% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A drop in similarity to the bottom_2024_aug pattern would mean current conditions are no longer aligned with the historical reference, invalidating the verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
